name: autohint

metadata.name: autohint
metadata.summary: AutoHint provides real-time search suggestions with internet integration.

documentation:
# AutoHint
This is made by Jai Akash

AutoHint is a Python module that provides an interactive search bar with real-time internet-based suggestions.

## Features
- Fetches real-time suggestions from the internet.
- Caches results to improve efficiency.
- Uses a debounce mechanism to optimize API requests.

## Installation
Install AutoHint from PyPI:
```bash
pip install autohint

functions.name: autohint.suggestion.fetch_suggestions_cached
documentation:
Fetch suggestions from the internet for a given query.
This function is cached to prevent redundant API calls.
Cache to store recent queries and their results

functions.name: autohint.suggestion.fetch_suggestions
documentation:
Fetch suggestions and update the global variable safely.
Implements debouncing to reduce excessive API calls.

functions.name: autohint.suggestion.search_bar
documentation:
Interactive search bar with real-time suggestions.
This version doesn't store or print the selected input.
